title: Ahtna, Inc. Announces Conclusion of Tolsona No. 1 Field Operations and Successful Demobilization
summary: Glennallen, Alaska – Ahtna, Inc. announced today that it has concluded operations on the Tolsona No. 1 gas exploration well after completion of the initial flow testing. All personnel, equipment and materials have been successfully demobilized from the drilling site, the well has been suspended and...
